__description: Archived daily summary reports for SQL daily_summary_archive table (DailySummaryArchive ORM). Created by /export-daily-summary endpoint. Seeded to show historical report data in the dashboard on fresh install.

daily_summary_archives.risk_tasks_json: <list: [{product_id, instruction, status}] — RiskManager tasks active on that day>
daily_summary_archives.insights_json: <list: [string] — key insights extracted from chat/review that day>
